# Tontine-petits-enfants-Njoume-et-Mongo
import { useState, useMemo } from "react";
import { Check, Clock, Wallet, Users, Home, Calendar, Landmark, Megaphone, AlertTriangle, ArrowDownCircle, PiggyBank, BellRing, BellOff, HandCoins } from "lucide-react";

// ---- Design tokens (wax-fabric inspired) ----
const C = {
  indigoDeep: "#1B1F4B",
  indigoMid: "#2D3A7C",
  marigold: "#E8A33D",
  marigoldLight: "#F4C873",
  waxRed: "#C1432E",
  waxGreen: "#2F6E51",
  ivory: "#F7EEDD",
  paper: "#FFFDF8",
  ink: "#221D1D",
  inkSoft: "#6B6458",
  momo: "#FFCC00",
  orangeMoney: "#FF6600",
};

const AVATAR_PALETTE = [
  "#C1432E", "#2F6E51", "#2D3A7C", "#E8A33D",
  "#8C4A2F", "#3E7C7C", "#B8722E", "#5C4A8C",
  "#A6572C", "#4A7A3E", "#6B3F6B", "#B08A2E",
];

// Membres réels de la Tontine, rangés dans l'ordre des bénéficiaires
// (mai → mars). Djene Marielle (taux forfaitaire) placée en dernier
// car elle ne bénéficie jamais de la cagnotte.
// photo : URL/chemin de la photo du membre — null tant qu'elle n'a
// pas été fournie (repli automatique sur les initiales).
// senior: true = aîné(e), false = cadet(te), relatif à Patrick Essake,
// administrateur de l'App et commissaire aux comptes de la Tontine —
// il est le point de référence, donc non concerné par aîné/cadet
// (senior: null, admin: true).
const FAMILY = [
  { nom: "Moussongo", prenom: "Marie", gender: "F", senior: true, momo: "MTN", paid: true, photo: null },
  { nom: "Essake", prenom: "Patrick", gender: "M", senior: null, admin: true, momo: "Orange", paid: true, photo: "data:image/jpeg;base64," },
  { nom: "Koum", prenom: "Eliane", gender: "F", senior: false, momo: "Orange", paid: false, photo: "data:image/jpeg;base64," },
  { nom: "Ndema", prenom: "Jules", gender: "M", senior: true, momo: "Orange", paid: false, photo: null },
  { nom: "Epee", prenom: "Nathanaël", gender: "M", senior: true, momo: "MTN", paid: false, photo: "data:image/jpeg;base64," },
  { nom: "Njoume", prenom: "Merveille", gender: "F", senior: false, momo: "MTN", paid: false, photo: null },
  { nom: "Ebondji", prenom: "Laditte", gender: "F", senior: false, momo: "Orange", paid: false, photo: "data:image/jpeg;base64,
